description: Style NoteLook dapper in this check black and white shirt from adidas while the soft cotton fabric will keep you cool and dry on a sunny day. Pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsBlack and white woven check shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
